'''Miagi Baker''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] living on [[Jubilar/Legends|Jubilar]]. He married [[Incavi Larado]], but died shortly afterward. Although it was suspected that Incavi was behind his death, there was never sufficient evidence to prove she killed him.

{{Char-stub}}
